description: VT terminology ladder, three rising rungs: weld-toe close-up with noticed mark (RELEVANT INDICATION + eye glyph), material cross-section with real interruption (DISCONTINUITY), same section found rejectable (DEFECT + REJECTABLE stamp). Gate arches INTERPRETATION and EVALUATION between rungs; ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA panel compares MEAS 3.4 mm vs MAX 3.0 mm with a pending-verdict slot that fills FAILS on the defect reveal. Whole ladder is dimly visible by default; reveals light rungs/gates. Hidden extras: ilGauge (measurement overlay) and ilAccept (MEETS -> ACCEPT & RECORD branch, vt1-3-3 only — vt2-1-1 must never reveal it). Alternate-lesson ids available: ilDisc/ilDiscontinuity (same rung-2 lit layer), ilInterpretation, ilEvaluation, ilArrow1 (disc->criteria, draw), ilArrow2 (criteria->defect, draw).
